## Goal

Describe the design outcome.

- `docs/design/00-design-index.md`

## Surfaces

- [ ] Landing
- [ ] Interactive sample report
- [ ] Early report intake
- [ ] Workspace preview

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The approved hero direction is preserved.
- [ ] The design does not imply live backend persistence, payment, or Market Watch.
- [ ] Evidence/source treatment is visible where claims are made.
- [ ] Mobile and desktop hierarchy are both addressed.

## Handoff Notes

Link design files or exports here. Web-ready assets should be placed under `public/` only when they are ready for implementation.
